calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Final Distribution On First And Final Account And Report Of Administrator For The Period 1-2-15 Through 5-31-16, And Petition For Its Settlement; Petition For Allowance Of Attorneys Statutory Fees And Administrator Statutory Commission
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerald Woods for Cheryl Keohane (Petitioner/Administrator).

The Court noted that at the last calling of the matter we had objectors, that they were to file their objections by April 12th and the Parties are not present. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution on First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Verified Petition For Final Distribution On First And Final Account And Report Of Administrator For The Period 1-2-15 Through 5-31-16, And Petition For Its Settlement; Petition For Allowance Of Attorneys Statutory Fees And Administrator Statutory Commission
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Rasmussen (Nephew of Decedent) in Propria Persona.
Tammy Gore (Niece of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

This was a pregranted matter. Mr. Rasmussen and Ms. Gore stated that they object to the petition. The Petition for Final Distribution on First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to April 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to file their objections. Objections are to be filed, served and noticed no later than April 12, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
